summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of OMINSOUNDS beat marketplace. Backend (20/20 tests passed - 100%) and Frontend (all critical flows working) testing completed successfully.

minor.issue: WebAudioPlayer load error - test audio files cannot be decoded. Files stored locally are minimal test files (not real audio)
Payment processing not functional (expected - API keys not configured). Orders created with PENDING status correctly

issues: Beat card titles may be truncated with TEST_ prefix data

critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good with proper data-testid attributes for testing
ESLint warnings in useEffect dependencies (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps) in BeatDetails.jsx, Orders.jsx, ProducerProfile.jsx - minor code quality issue
S3 service disabled as expected (no AWS credentials) - files stored locally in /app/backend/uploads
Asaas payment integration ready but not functional without API keys (by design)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users and beats created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested: Registration (USER/PRODUCER), Login, Beat listing with filters, Beat details page with license selection, Add to cart, Cart page, Checkout with PIX/Credit Card/Boleto options, Order creation (PENDING status), Orders page, Producer profile page. Asaas payment integration is NOT configured (by design) - orders are created with PENDING status. S3 is disabled - files stored locally in /app/backend/uploads.

features_tested.user_registration: PASS - Both USER and PRODUCER roles
features_tested.beat_upload: PASS - Producer can upload beats (stored locally)
features_tested.beat_listing: PASS - Filters working (genre, BPM, key, search)
features_tested.beat_details: PASS - All elements present, license selection updates price
features_tested.producer_profile: PASS - Stats and beats displayed correctly
features_tested.add_to_cart: PASS - Cart state managed with Zustand
features_tested.cart_page: PASS - Items displayed with remove functionality
features_tested.checkout: PASS - All payment methods available (PIX, Credit Card, Boleto)
features_tested.order_creation: PASS - Orders created with PENDING status
features_tested.orders_page: PASS - User orders displayed with status badges
features_tested.global_player: PARTIAL - Audio decoding errors for test files (expected)
